title: Sour Flaky Olive Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly sour flaky Chinese (Hunan) dish featuring extra virgin olive oil and air-fried vegetables with a touch of lemon zest for added freshness.

ingredients.name: olive greens
ingredients.notes: choose ones with tender leaves and a slight bitterness

ingredients.name: baby bell peppers
ingredients.notes: thinly sliced for easier air frying

instructions: Wash and dry olive greens thoroughly, then chop them into thin strips.
Thinly slice baby bell peppers and shallots.
In a bowl, combine the olive oil, lemon zest, salt, and ground black pepper. Add the chopped olive greens to this mixture.
Add sliced bell peppers and shallots, mix well until all ingredients are coated evenly with the seasoning.
Transfer the stir-fried vegetables into your preheated air fryer basket, making sure they don't overcrowd it.
Air-fry for about 10-12 minutes or until olive greens become tender but still retain their crispness. Stir occasionally to ensure even cooking.
Remove from air fryer and sprinkle sour cherry tomatoes over the top before serving.
